title: Gooey Yoghurt Strudel
description: A traditional German dessert featuring a gooey centre and a crispy strudel crust. This recipe combines the sweetness of yoghurt with the crunch of mediterranean pastry.

ingredients.name: Yoghurt
ingredients.notes: Full-fat yoghurt is recommended for the best flavour and texture.

ingredients.name: Mediterranean Pastry
ingredients.notes: You can find this in most supermarkets or make your own from scratch.

ingredients.name: Cinnamon
ingredients.notes: Optional, but adds a nice flavour.

instructions: 2. Roll out the mediterranean pastry on a floured surface to a large rectangle.
3. Spread the yoghurt evenly over the pastry, leaving a 2cm border around the edges.
4. Sprinkle the granulated sugar and cinnamon over the yoghurt (if using).
5. Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling to create a seal.
6. Brush the egg wash over the pastry to give it a golden brown colour.
7. Bake the strudel in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
